news.title: Can Honeywell’s Ecofining Partnership in Brazil Reframe the Low‑Carbon Narrative for Honeywell (HON)?
news.summary: Earlier in June, Honeywell announced that its modular Ecofining technology, pumps, compressors, and control systems will support Acelen Renewables’ new sustainable aviation fuel and renewable diesel facility in Bahia, Brazil. This project highlights how Honeywell is pairing process technology with automation and digital insights to accelerate lower-emission fuel production using waste feedstocks.
